title: OutlineVanila
body:
Enhance your Minecraft experience while preserving the classic Vanilla feel.

This modpack is designed to improve the visual quality, performance, and overall gameplay of Minecraft without removing the charm of the original game. Players can enjoy the familiar Minecraft experience with smoother performance and modern visual improvements.

Key Features

Significantly improved and more stable frame rates

Enhanced HUD and UI for a cleaner, more modern look

Outline Shader that makes entities and objects easier to see

More immersive first-person item handling

Various Quality of Life improvements for smoother gameplay

Visual enhancements that make the Minecraft world feel more alive

This modpack is perfect for players who want a better-looking, smoother Minecraft experience while keeping the core Vanilla atmosphere intact.

For more details, check the Gallery tab.

A new modpack inspired by SystemZee.
